basic_details.job_title: SSP SAIL Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Salem Steel Plant, Steel Authority of India Limited
basic_details.short_information: The Steel Authority of India Limited (SSP SAIL) has officially announced the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 18-05-2026 at SAIL Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age criteria of 69 years and hold M.B.B.S and M.D qualifications can now attend the walk-in interview on 01-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply for the walk-in process are shared below.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Screening
